name: Tom Fitton
subject: Justice Cover Up!
body: It should surprise no one that on Joe Biden’s short list for attorney general was former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates, an Obama holdover “who shot to national prominence after President Donald Trump fired her, making her one of the first heroes of the #Resistance.” [INSIDE JW] JUSTICE COVER UP! [JW] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22079&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1CQlhfSDZWQ1M0MCZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] Judicial Watch Seeks Release of Sally Yates Records on Her Refusal to Defend President Trump’s Travel Ban It should surprise no one that on Joe Biden’s short list for attorney general was former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22080&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMveWF0ZXMtcmVjb3Jkcy1taXNjb25kdWN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIxMzAzMTMxNg==], an Obama holdover “who shot to national prominence after President Donald Trump fired her, making her one of the first heroes of the #Resistance.” President Trump fired her after she refused in early 2017 to enforce his travel ban executive order. We filed an appeal [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22081&F=T&] with the US Court of Appeals for the DC Circuit in order to gain the release of Department of Justice records about Yates’ gross insubordination. We argue that the documents are not shielded from disclosure, as they are evidence of government misconduct by Yates. At issue are four records described as “working drafts” of a January 30, 2017 statement by Yates instructing DOJ officials not to defend the executive order issued by then-President Trump. Trump fired Yates after she issued the one-page statement [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22082&F=T&]. The appeal concerns a May 2017 FOIA lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22083&F=T&] we filed after the Justice Department failed to respond to a February FOIA request seeking Yates’ emails from her government account (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22084&F=T&] (No. 1:17-cv-00832)) for the time period she served as Acting Attorney General for President Trump. We recently filed the brief in the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia (Judicial Watch vs. U.S. Department of Justice [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22081&F=T&] (No. 20-5304)). The lower court ruled that the Justice Department could withhold the records under FOIA’s Exemption 5 [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22085&F=T&] “deliberative process privilege,” which is used to keep secret “pre-decisional” agency records. We argue that the court has recognized “that government misconduct may overcome the deliberative process privilege.” “[W]here there is reason to believe the documents sought may shed light on government misconduct, the privilege is routinely denied, on the grounds that shielding internal government deliberations in this context does not serve the public’s interest in honest, effective government.” *** Insubordination, especially by an acting attorney general seeking to defy an executive order issued by the President, is a “serious breach of the responsibilities of representative government.” The records at issue relate directly to Yates’ defiance of the President and breach of the duties she owed the President, which resulted in her being fired. The records reflect, or at least are purported to reflect, the thought process by which Yates chose to direct her subordinates to defy the President by not defending the President’s executive order. They are, in effect, deliberations on Yates’ decision to commit insubordination. They do not warrant protection under the deliberative process privilege and should be made public. The “working drafts” were sent as attachments in a chain of emails sent without messages between Yates and her deputy Matthew Axelrod. We also highlight how the Justice Department is undermining the FOIA reforms the Congress passed into law under the FOIA Improvements Act (FIA) in 2016 that “established a new, heightened standard of proof that agencies must meet when making discretionary withholdings of records requested under FOIA. Congress intended the FIA to shore up FOIA, not preserve a years-long, unsatisfactory status quo of ‘withhold-it-because-you-want-to’ exemptions and ‘knee-jerk secrecy.’” In an act of seditious and unethical conduct, Obama holdover Sally Yates sought to subvert then-President Trump by interfering with his lawful travel ban. That the Justice Department would try to cover up the details of this lawlessness is yet another scandal. As an indication of the pandemic of lawlessness in the Justice Department, we obtained [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22086&F=T&] records in this case in 2017 that show strong support by Robert Mueller Deputy Andrew Weissmann [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22087&F=T&] and other top DOJ officials for Yates’ refusal to enforce President Trump’s travel ban. In one email Weissmann writes: “I am so proud. And in awe. Thank you so much. All my deepest respects.” PROFESSOR CHARGED WITH STEALING $1.75 MILLION IN RESEARCH FOR CHINA We are closely watching the growing threat China poses to the United States, not the least of which is its wholesale, systematic theft of scientific and medical research. A recent criminal indictment, reported [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL3Byb2Zlc3Nvci1jaGFyZ2VkLXdpdGgtc3RlYWxpbmctcmVzZWFyY2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] in our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog, illustrates how this theft is too often enabled with your tax dollars: Communist China has long benefitted from American-funded research stolen by Chinese academics who infiltrate colleges throughout the United States. This month a criminal indictment [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22089&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByZXNzLXJlbGVhc2UvZmlsZS8xMzY0Mjc2L2Rvd25sb2FkP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1nb3ZkZWxpdmVyeSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIxMzAzMTMxNg==] sheds light on a recent scheme allegedly masterminded by a Chinese professor at one of the nation’s top-ranked public universities. His name is Lin Yang, a 43-year-old member of the Thousand Talents Program (TTP) operated by the Chinese government to transfer original ideas, technology and intellectual property from foreign institutions, especially American colleges. TTP rewards Chinese scientists for stealing propriety information, usually funded by Uncle Sam. In this case Yang, an associate professor in the Department of Biomedical Engineering at the University of Florida (UF), fraudulently obtained a $1.75 million federal grant to conduct research that he stole for China, according to a federal indictment. The money came from the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the U.S. government’s handsomely funded medical research agency, which has an immense $41.7 BILLION [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=19296&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlhaWQubmloLmdvdi9ncmFudHMtY29udHJhY3RzL2J1ZGdldC1hcHByb3ByaWF0aW9uLWZpc2NhbC15ZWFyLTIwMjA/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTMwMzEzMTY=] annual budget. The research involved developing an imaging informatics tool for muscles known as “MuscleMiner.” Federal prosecutors say that between 2014 and 2019 Yang served as the principal investigator for the NIH grant at UF, a top-ranked public research institution in Gainesville. That means he was responsible for conducting and administering the money in compliance with applicable federal law and institutional policies. “Among other things, Yang was required to disclose his foreign research support and financial conflicts of interest, including his ownership of, or interest in, a foreign company,” according to a Department of Justice (DOJ) announcement [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=22090&F=T&]. Instead, Yang established a business in China known as “Deep Informatics” that he promoted by disclosing that its products were the result of years of research supported by millions of dollars of U.S. government funding. To maintain employment at UF and continue receiving NIH grant money, Yang intentionally concealed his conflicts of interest, including his Chinese business, participation in the TTP and affiliation with a Chinese research university. “On multiple occasions, Yang submitted disclosures to NIH containing false statements and material omissions concerning his affiliations and research endeavors with a foreign government and company,” the DOJ reveals. Additionally, in January 2019, UF’s College of Engineering required all faculty to provide, in writing, updated disclosures concerning activities with foreign entities in China and two other countries. Yang provided UF with a written response falsely stating he had no affiliation with any business, entity, or university in China, the indictment states. Yang fled to China in August 2019. He has been charged with six counts of wire fraud and four counts of making false statements to an agency of the United States. This is hardly an isolated case. The U.S. government has long permitted communists working in the U.S. to steal billions of dollars in taxpayer-funded research. Many of them work at public universities throughout the country or at government agencies such as the NIH, National Science Foundation (NSF) or national laboratories affiliated with the Department of Energy (DOE). For decades many of the institutions have been deeply impacted by Chinese infiltrators stealing highly valuable intellectual property. A U.S. Senate INVESTIGATION determined that not only has American-funded research long been stolen by China, but that the work is helping the communist nation meet its goal of becoming a world leader in science and technology. China uses hundreds of government-funded talent recruitment plans, such as TTP, to incentivize individuals engaged in research and development in the U.S to transmit information in exchange for salaries, research funding, lab space and other perks. The communists then use the American research for their own economic and military gain. The Trump administration addressed the problem by having the NIH FIRE DOZENS [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=19276&F=T&] of scientists last summer over their secret financial ties to communist China. It is not clear how long they went undetected or how much taxpayer-funded research they stole, but at the time some 54 scientists got booted for failing to disclose a troubling financial arrangement with a foreign government. In the overwhelming majority of cases—93%—the cash came from China, according to an NIH INVESTIGATION [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=19295&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hY2Qub2QubmloLmdvdi9kb2N1bWVudHMvcHJlc2VudGF0aW9ucy8wNjEyMjAyMEZvcmVpZ25JbmZsdWVuY2VzLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIxMzAzMTMxNg==] that started more than two years ago. Also, in most of the probes the targets were Asian men in their 50s. The bulk of the ousted researchers received generous grants from the NIH, which annually invests TENS OF BILLIONS OF DOLLARS [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=19297&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmloLmdvdi9hYm91dC1uaWgvd2hhdC13ZS1kby9idWRnZXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTMwMzEzMTY=] in medical research by giving around 50,000 grants to more than 300,000 researchers at more than 2,500 universities, medical schools and other institutions throughout the country. Only 10% of the agency’s budget supports projects conducted by scientists in its own lab in Bethesda, Maryland. Until next week, [Signature] Tom Fitton [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMjEzMDMxMzE2] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52914&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDIxMzAzMTMxNg==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - U.S. Department of Justice [=] (No. 1:17-cv-00832)) for the time period she served as Acting Attorney General for President Trump. name: Team Cammack
subject: New Target on Florida
body:
Our liberties at stake
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w_nM8ItMVTw3NOw--wPfGfilR3NORDe59ZiboEZ4GQ5L4CY-cNH_Xa76hJQePZgndJxhZNY-ZKuMp5DOtE3afvFHjb2-knswBPHKtTugJsN2AIO7hQRtV9IXL8uW_Z6duy4-OOKW7T_gDJ_YvufwHy-IE9R4WLEbiXSqHlK7ytDw7g3bJj-jkg==&c=lU_olvOHdtiM17cujQx4-9izEam0JGyp_bj5n-XQ40y9VJo91Ng4QA==&ch=IK_axPBq2YthV8RVHToAcruLgQhK45MTmKfV6JmOowHpkH4ut8I2Vg==)
---
| Patriot,
Earlier this week, the Biden administration put a huge political and economic target on Florida.
An unnamed source from the White House released a statement saying they were considering imposing domestic travel restrictions on Florida.

Kat supports Governor Desantis and the Florida legislature's decisions to keep Florida open for business based on the latest science and a deep reverence for our constitutional freedoms.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Who’s Looking Out for the Little Guy? 😳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0fyC909r47f7mTO328LTEwtkwoSh8w3BGvvon7kjzDKHVE8R_UsllJ0lxBuwJXn0M-7iH1yZIcxxNV0hT62ODPA-9aLmAXMpQRbnotXW0d-voZZM7FXhbqbbwsHNHLuG3dnUdl3XpT5yq5la539a7tQMPjWHjoHbEvPNh5lbGkw4OtT6UPIcZBfGOboGESGKHEipIa5_oUxD0y8zWeP-k32yBAkp_nh91AQfOOorNCSOs3-ulQbrXGSCx2DEAlJ3mXN3-9COq1-W2LX6RheznNVA%3D) **Who’s Looking Out for the Little Guy? 😳
** Coronavirus relief should go towards struggling American workers, not their big bosses and not U.S. universities who partner with Chinese institutions. This week, we focused on the Democrats’ partisan $1.9 trillion stimulus package in the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. I took the opportunity to offer an [amendment](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0fze3DbywMq0SP6A2jt6dh--bvRwYYx2ulWOhuPyIFpoZL_shdQaOFLwRfRJJT72GYnqAjIBWmyy3f0Q8zf4TIbMT6MPZ_HdJ_WXrBsmAaRL5KaAdAfawOC866ZHSikapHPXs_UbuylZ-a559Y9tP5sP7g6L9o3xQ3LWHHfXtVKawjJ_M2F-RyYEm3kZD3AZFwvuki-6xmqOTHWEPQ2ClhfCD9vYRbuXzg5mt7CGwemRQ9lkRaoO3k9AJaSmhuEH07IUtPXtlxH0aMMG32GPxpG_FGgjjyg5rdXAWyn2nMja_)** to prohibit airline executives from using coronavirus relief money to pay themselves large bonuses**. Seems like common sense, no? And yet all my Democrat colleagues on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee rejected the amendment. That wasn’t the only time my liberal colleagues rejected common sense in favor of out-of-control spending. Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik [offered](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0fz0BI3GFCZBzfvbLslswNKb8AsvgT2JfjbGvbTENwmBBR4lXGSEhfKkliHlP2LwZ67F4Rc8pvyTtvle9uITHZk4fPT8RhQhnZWabosVJGbzjw3JvR_0bRF1ufaId623ww0ut_m-LVZX1F82wT_3Ma8sYH69vbPLCmF-auxpPx1wYVilBUg5_XEgMsQLg6oahX8HQ4jpxxWyMrWoruboyTVMWESAxtRJkUFtkepuNP2jFxnCIDDaxayth1B9O9lfzzKKTfEyK202ce-AI7ryhk_8u8ZZWd9MsIG1pEusjvCeONOqrfVHLHd0zEHHqVoSU-NXLBL_rBDwZhjjPZYiLKU4%3D) an amendment to make sure coronavirus funds don’t go to U.S. institutions who partner with the Chinese Communist Party, like American universities [who take millions](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0f-sSQRQTnWxTgbonXJid2Fzxoy2BE7r01IvSJYHSXmI1KqNMRRUt-wTHD4cO-_bkDOn7KtTVQUJite3wPRegA5RKyptwIiwcBua_LPV5mnZAO-aCXjV6wMxmj4Yqb-acrbNWHL1zjqzrTdW9CYn6meETytmYJ7fY1rf3Og3w0mhSS4W3lBgu3QuwhPIywbz_hAjagCjxhsw7o6FXDccolK87m1ZtVWoOoIZt6ENJWtpcjqov033L0RnoMahEbsAq9fgicf33D8-7zNrOZBbJEWQMkUTsahFWqStAHSQlV6Zk2NOt8uqLzk4Tj-tlP02Ptg%3D%3D) in Chinese funds to host Confucius Institutes on their campuses. Democrats [voted against it](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0f6dnn8jiBZdw-jQKz-SchwqY65SbNv5MJChmn5iFezXLlW26Qm6U_JUS_-RVGf_4xJRFBuw7UUk52hzoilOctDS2IDTHEzf6mDtL6ITiGlBbC8aSXPc75FTkxVZTkW1kbfw3YhprdkDTVZMNaUNZQkcNq9HrnNJgaaGxv7tgh6wU7RVIYQsM4XNgAWvSfyKRiWDZZrlJ1__nKbFp3cJdNDasjSfHqSYXoctI6MFOJpYrY3zr2BMSJWTNm79TBHGKIXzoDc8fpS4wtygTHnCitVaG00QXkvyfleMa2xcjwMtFRElP4yU6awGmxUNlnVPahQ%3D%3D), too. The coronavirus pandemic has taken its toll on a lot of folks, but Democrats refuse to make sure taxpayer dollars go only to those who need the help the most. Apparently, they think Communist China’s allies and airline CEOs need a boost. I beg to differ. | |
---
**Prime Jobs for Tennessee 📦
**
_wolterke - stock.adobe.com_

[Amazon is coming to town](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0f25KaFibbvg2Pf_wHGCUBXOLs-L4ToHGZ-850bK8H7CccNBLCsqClVrS4Hb8bhlM0Ghn3mlPVLRwL2Y3r-8Dum46ojahsxGbrsKwmXvRekFdN77-ebcuI3qreCR-hV5WgPkLbnwzFHWog39IunURw4NMOeZZ0W9rvyDvWz-rW_NvTfBI2_mg9rLb-ryFGsA296tNXGyCTALmcK22gbhM10qXU7whxorDca3z_q3sepYLnv_bj_fnpIRhn7qKWZZ5xQrUN9q105rI9b8CD7ezw6-k3xgMEEhUlmX02KylcAOJ) and it’s not just to deliver your paper towels! The company has announced projects in each of Tennessee's grand divisions. **This is great news for our economy, with 3,000 jobs estimated to be introduced**. Our home state is a great place to do business, and our workforce is one of our greatest assets!

The most recent project is a $200 million investment in eastern Tennessee to build a new warehouse distribution center. The Alcoa-based project is expected to be completed in 2022. It will be Amazon’s third center to use robotics technology in Tennessee, and the eighth fulfillment center in the state.
|

**Just for Fun 💪
**
Give this woman the “mom of the year” award. [Police footage shows a middle-aged woman tackling a man to the ground—quite impressively](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f55daf1e62864d93915404e2a398ed07&_e=OE88Pc-cM8Dd6B_XaZK0f2kHArzTNAwDIj7xqLvU340DCLe35XO1e0SrcD4PtEXJ0_MmC0uaM0mgfqcMfZJPWYVE6AKlfQJ77smqJ1EkKRlywQ6f6eCWFQQ_XEDsoE0f-3prj-RoGvs_zi4O4Gc7URwaXZ3eFl9a0fPYy49oFGqBcPy3yf-IAwJDFJv0DewQymx0Zo51xUNUwTYBdNssk4Q8wsa8hgYZ9c-fZ_7Z8aFgeXNn-FGUwOmF28dN1VuHaNFwWq7XcvF3wcsj1_DL9P0EUUjortlk2laXgVJrUGml3SIjNKyDMyieb2oHJWZW). The man had been peeping into her daughter’s bedroom window Saturday morning, and mama was not having it!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. Who’s Looking Out for the Little Guy? 😳 Coronavirus relief should go towards struggling American workers, not their big bosses and not U.S. universities who partner with Chinese institutions. This week, we focused on the Democrats’ partisan $1.9 trillion stimulus package in the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee. I took the opportunity to offer an to prohibit airline executives from using coronavirus relief money to pay themselves large bonuses. Seems like common sense, no? And yet all my Democrat colleagues on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee rejected the amendment. That wasn’t the only time my liberal colleagues rejected common sense in favor of out-of-control spending. Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik an amendment to make sure coronavirus funds don’t go to U.S. institutions who partner with the Chinese Communist Party, like American universities in Chinese funds to host Confucius Institutes on their campuses. Democrats , too. The coronavirus pandemic has taken its toll on a lot of folks, but Democrats refuse to make sure taxpayer dollars go only to those who need the help the most. Apparently, they think Communist China’s allies and airline CEOs need a boost. I beg to differ. | | Prime Jobs for Tennessee 📦 wolterke - stock.adobe.com and it’s not just to deliver your paper towels! The company has announced projects in each of Tennessee's grand divisions. This is great news for our economy, with 3,000 jobs estimated to be introduced. Our home state is a great place to do business, and our workforce is one of our greatest assets! The most recent project is a $200 million investment in eastern Tennessee to build a new warehouse distribution center. The Alcoa-based project is expected to be completed in 2022. It will be Amazon’s third center to use robotics technology in Tennessee, and the eighth fulfillment center in the state. | Just for Fun 💪 Give this woman the “mom of the year” award. . The man had been peeping into her daughter’s bedroom window Saturday morning, and mama was not having it! | Check out the Burchett Store 👕 Need some Team Burchett swag? We’re here to help. We have hats, t-shirts, and stickers so you can support our campaign and our shared conservative values in style. | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

clean_body: Arkansas deserves leadership that has proven itself time and again to put our state and its citizens first. == Friend, I'll keep this brief. I am running for Governor to make Arkansans first, and I have a record in the state of doing just that. I have helped save Arkansans millions of dollars from price gougers during the COVID-19 pandemic. I have helped Arkansas first responders by allocating resources to help them serve their communities. I fought to protect independent pharmacies from predatory PBM 's and help increase access to affordable healthcare for all Arkansans. I 'm leading the fight against NY AG's ILLEGAL lawsuit against the NRA. And that's only the beginning. == SUPPORT THE RUTLEDGE RECORD | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == Arkansas deserves leadership that has proven itself time and again to put our state and its citizens first. I am running on that record and not just rhetoric. SUPPORT THE RUTLEDGE RECORD | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == As Governor, I will deliver as I have during my time as Attorney General. Your support is all I need to know this is a fight worth taking. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Somos PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee](https://act
body:
---
| | In 2016, Nevada made history by electing its first woman, and our country's _**FIRST EVER**_ Latina, to serve in the United States Senate. Catherine Cortez Masto is a trailblazer and a powerful leader in the Senate -- **but now she 's also a TOP Republican target in 2022.** [](https://act.somospac.%3D%3D/?g=6FsAG_qMaklfgqE9dvMhfTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/somos_nevada_feb21?refcode=EM_BS_SOM_210213_FR_CCM_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=somosvotantes&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=EM_BS_SOM_210213_FR_CCM_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&source=EM_BS_SOM_210213_FR_CCM_A0_na_U1_X1_M1") We're standing with Cortez Masto today to FIGHT BACK against the GOP's brazen attacks and to DEFEND our Senate majority. name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Rob=20Ortt?=
subject: It's Time to INVESTIGATE!
body:
The Cuomo administration admitted to a cover-up. We need an immediate investigation. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6d09e84cee1e/robs-wrap-up-happy-superbowl-sunday-10018248?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friends,

BREAKING NEWS - Governor Cuomo's top aide was caught on tape admitting they lied about nursing home deaths to protect the Governor and his political allies.

Read the **[bombshell report](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=3551eb2427&e=9f843ba602)** from the New York Post here:
---
| [ ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=8916debbcd&e=9f843ba602)
---
| | My Senate Republican Colleagues have demanded an **immediate investigation of Governor Cuomo** and his administration.

What did the Governor know, and when did he know it? There must be a top bottom approach, and if wrongdoing is found then those involved must be prosecuted.
_**SIGN OUR PETITION IF YOU SUPPORT A FULL INVESTIGATION IN TO GOVERNOR CUOMO:**_
---
| [ ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=e3cc346fc2&e=9f843ba602)
---
| Governor Cuomo's administration lied to the public for MONTHS. Justice needs to be brought to our grieving families who have been ignored. **_[Sign our petition to call for an immediate investigation. ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=360c3de543&e=9f843ba602)_**

We will keep fighting. We hope you'll **[stand with us.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=2594487955&e=9f843ba602)**

Thank you,

Rob Ortt
Senate Republican Leader
---

name: Moms for Justice
subject: Shame on them
body:
momsinoffice.org [momsinoffice.org]image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/plaskett_.png]We all know Trump should have been convicted
Peter,
It took less than a week for the Senate to end the second impeachment trial of the former president. The House impeachment managers were brilliant, and the lawyers of the defense were almost laughably incompetent.
But the Republican Senators were as obstructionist as usual. While it is abundantly clear that they know Trump incited the insurrection of January 6th, even going so far as to say so in statements they have made, they voted to acquit a criminal for the second time.
Take Action [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0213]It is a dereliction of their duty as a chamber of Congress to provide oversight over the executive branch. It is a violation of their oaths of office, to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies - foreign and domestic.
We will not forget that while preaching unity, 43 Senate Republicans voted against the justice and accountability required for our country to begin to heal. We will ensure that they all face challengers at the ballot when they are up for re-election. Stand with us to support those challengers. [...]
Donate Now [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0213]Thanks for all you do,
Simona Grace

Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/9e7d3c88-366e-eb11-9889-00155d43c992/452fea09-476e-eb11-9889-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1MmZlYTA5LTQ3NmUtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0ZsxL2XYMgcGQKxA82ZzIqmsTlQ1Bv6LV4bp8q8zBo=&id=103678513 .

Take Action [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0213]It is a dereliction of their duty as a chamber of Congress to provide oversight over the executive branch. It is a violation of their oaths of office, to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies - foreign and domestic. We will not forget that while preaching unity, 43 Senate Republicans voted against the justice and accountability required for our country to begin to heal. We will ensure that they all face challengers at the ballot when they are up for re-election. Stand with us to support those challengers. [...] Donate Now [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0213]Thanks for all you do, Simona Grace Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: Republicans are “optimistic” they can flip the House -- we can’t let that happen | = | | Friends -- We knew that Republicans would get a head start to flip this district in 2022, but we didn’t expect it to come so soon. We just got our hands on a leaked memo from the National Republican Congressional Committee about their 2022 target House districts -- and NV-03 is on it: is sounding the alarm, and we’re putting together an urgent fundraising campaign to reach $25,000 by the end of this week.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = Susie won by only THREE POINTS in November, so Republicans aren’t just speculating -- they’re telling their supporters that they can BEAT Susie in 2022. body:
Become one of our first official endorsers. | | | Peter,
**After we launched our campaign for Senate, my team started pulling together a list of *official* endorsers.** Yep, things are already getting real. I mean, they’re making me put on pants for interviews now, *INSTEAD* of shorts. 🙄 Look, it would mean the world to me to see your name on our list. Earning your support is the whole reason I decided to go for it and join this race. There’s still time to add your name to our list, so I am humbly asking: [_**Can I count on your endorsement for U.S. Senate? name: RSLC
subject: Rush in reinforcements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
The Dem Donor machine is beating us...
****
Friend,
We're running out of time.
State Republicans have a critical fundraising deadline on MONDAY, and we NEED to reach it to ensure we WIN in upcoming special elections.
Democrats are planning to do whatever it takes to flip our Republican State Majorities -- if we fall behind in resources, we're not going to like the outcome.

name: True the Vote
subject: The Steps | True the Vote Weekly Update | 2.13.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3978)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | The Steps
---
| | I read a very motivating article this week called “[How to Turn Your Red State Blue](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20lMkYyMDIxJTJGMDIlMkYxMSUyRm9waW5pb24lMkZzdGFjZXktYWJyYW1zLWdlb3JnaWEtZWxlY3Rpb24uaHRtbA==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3990)”.

You should read it. In fact, anyone interested in voters’ rights and election integrity should read it.

Written by Stacy Abrams and Lauren Groh-Wargo, the article lays out the steps taken to turn Georgia blue. They sum it up this way:

**_“The steps toward victory are straightforward:
understand your weaknesses, organize with your allies, shore up
your political infrastructure and focus on the long game.” _** **_
_** And they’re correct.

Now, let me stop here to address a few obvious questions:

Q: Isn’t this a political article celebrating Democrats and isn’t True the Vote supposed to be nonpartisan and nonpolitical?

A: True the Vote is neither partisan nor political. But that’s not the point.

Q: Why would you draw attention to a politically focused article written by Stacy Abrams given that she’s publicly accused True the Vote of voter intimidation and suppression?

A: Well...it’s worse that that. We have been sued by and [are countersuing Stacy Abrams’ group](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3979) Fair Fight Action. They sued us to stop Georgia voters from filing elector challenges. We countersued to protect citizens’ rights to petition their government without fear of intimidation or abuse. But that’s not the point.

You should read this article to understand their commitment to strategy, tactics, and execution. Now reflect on what your own experience has been as it relates to election integrity. Even if you’ve never actually worked in an election just by virtue of living through the 2020 election cycle I suspect you have opinions. OK, hang in here with me....

Let’s revise the quote:

“The steps toward election integrity are straightforward: understand
current weaknesses, organize with your allies, shore up your
constitutional infrastructure and focus on the long game.”
Election integrity was hit hard in 2020. Really, really hard. Disciplined strategy and tactical execution were in short supply. It was incredibly painful, but it happened. And we can never let it happen again.
__
The steps are straightforward:

* We have to understand and address weaknesses... there are many ways to look at weakness, but improvements are already being made on some fronts. States are rallying to support much-needed election reforms. [Support your state representatives](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkYlMjNtYXA=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3991) and help them hold the line against the coming federal overreach.

* We have to organize with allies....ok, this hits closer to home. What organizations are you affiliated with? What is their stance on election integrity? Could you help bring groups together? Even special interest groups have an interest in election integrity. Picture connected organizations across your county working in 2022 to ensure every polling place is filled with volunteers, every voter record is checked, and all eyes are on election accountability. For now, just think about this, think about who you know, think about connections. The organizing will start soon.

* We have to shore up our constitutional infrastructure...the Abrams’ article called it ‘political infrastructure’, but election integrity transcends politics. In 2020 we watched as constitutional standards were spiked. [A tsunami of lawsuits, bureaucrat fiats, and last-minute rule changes ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZiYWxsb3RwZWRpYS5vcmclMkZDaGFuZ2VzX3RvX2VsZWN0aW9uX2RhdGVzJTJDX3Byb2NlZHVyZXMlMkNfYW5kX2FkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9uX2luX3Jlc3BvbnNlX3RvX3RoZV9jb3JvbmF2aXJ1c18lMjhDT1ZJRC0xOSUyOV9wYW5kZW1pYyUyQ18yMDIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3992)set our country on a jumbled journey of confusion and lawlessness. More could have been done to stop this. More should have been done. But now, forewarned is forearmed. We know [HR1/S1](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjElMkZ0ZXh0JTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUzQSUyNTVCJTI1MjJocjElMjUyMiUyNTVEJTI1N0QlMjZyJTNEMSUyNnMlM0Qx&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3993) is setting up the unconstitutional federalization of elections. God forbid it passes, but if it does we must be ready to stand together in opposition to it, through legislation, litigation, and citizen-engagement.

* Lastly, we must focus on the long game. Election standards have been eroding for a long, long time. And after what we just went through it will take time to restore the public trust. Stay engaged.

True the Vote’s 2021 plans will follow these steps. Right now, the dust is still settling. More and more information will be available in the months ahead. Shocking facts will come to light. Secure apps and organizing platforms will be launched. There will be projects you can be part of.

For now, please take a minute and read [Stacy Abrams’ article](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20lMkYyMDIxJTJGMDIlMkYxMSUyRm9waW5pb24lMkZzdGFjZXktYWJyYW1zLWdlb3JnaWEtZWxlY3Rpb24uaHRtbA==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=368A862A20A3990), think through the above steps, call your county (if you didn’t do it, see last week’s email), and ... stay connected.

Yes, these are chaotic times, but we are made stronger through adversity. Do not give up. Focus on the long game. Working together, we really can true the vote.

Ever onward,

---
| | | |
---
| | |

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | The Steps | | I read a very motivating article this week called “”. You should read it. In fact, anyone interested in voters’ rights and election integrity should read it. Written by Stacy Abrams and Lauren Groh-Wargo, the article lays out the steps taken to turn Georgia blue. They sum it up this way: “The steps toward victory are straightforward: understand your weaknesses, organize with your allies, shore up your political infrastructure and focus on the long game.” And they’re correct. Now, let me stop here to address a few obvious questions: Q: Isn’t this a political article celebrating Democrats and isn’t True the Vote supposed to be nonpartisan and nonpolitical? A: True the Vote is neither partisan nor political. But that’s not the point. Q: Why would you draw attention to a politically focused article written by Stacy Abrams given that she’s publicly accused True the Vote of voter intimidation and suppression? A: Well...it’s worse that that. We have been sued by and Fair Fight Action. They sued us to stop Georgia voters from filing elector challenges. We countersued to protect citizens’ rights to petition their government without fear of intimidation or abuse. But that’s not the point. You should read this article to understand their commitment to strategy, tactics, and execution. Now reflect on what your own experience has been as it relates to election integrity. Even if you’ve never actually worked in an election just by virtue of living through the 2020 election cycle I suspect you have opinions. OK, hang in here with me.... Let’s revise the quote: “The steps toward election integrity are straightforward: understand current weaknesses, organize with your allies, shore up your constitutional infrastructure and focus on the long game.” Election integrity was hit hard in 2020. Really, really hard. Disciplined strategy and tactical execution were in short supply. It was incredibly painful, but it happened. And we can never let it happen again. __ The steps are straightforward: We have to understand and address weaknesses... there are many ways to look at weakness, but improvements are already being made on some fronts. States are rallying to support much-needed election reforms. and help them hold the line against the coming federal overreach. We have to organize with allies....ok, this hits closer to home. What organizations are you affiliated with? What is their stance on election integrity? Could you help bring groups together? Even special interest groups have an interest in election integrity. Picture connected organizations across your county working in 2022 to ensure every polling place is filled with volunteers, every voter record is checked, and all eyes are on election accountability. For now, just think about this, think about who you know, think about connections. The organizing will start soon. We have to shore up our constitutional infrastructure...the Abrams’ article called it ‘political infrastructure’, but election integrity transcends politics. In 2020 we watched as constitutional standards were spiked. our country on a jumbled journey of confusion and lawlessness. More could have been done to stop this. More should have been done. But now, forewarned is forearmed. We know is setting up the unconstitutional federalization of elections. God forbid it passes, but if it does we must be ready to stand together in opposition to it, through legislation, litigation, and citizen-engagement. Lastly, we must focus on the long game. Election standards have been eroding for a long, long time. And after what we just went through it will take time to restore the public trust. Stay engaged. True the Vote’s 2021 plans will follow these steps. Right now, the dust is still settling. More and more information will be available in the months ahead. Shocking facts will come to light. Secure apps and organizing platforms will be launched. There will be projects you can be part of. For now, please take a minute and read , think through the above steps, call your county (if you didn’t do it, see last week’s email), and ... stay connected. Yes, these are chaotic times, but we are made stronger through adversity. Do not give up. Focus on the long game. Working together, we really can true the vote. body:
We desperately need your help to keep up with the Democrats' cash flood

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fcFCrzBcdclN41lMgvJfnwNI5VYt0pxJLu_N6JJszgHKtnQ1hrrzOk1Tk8C9ZxwaxwVyqskWExbhuFqsbYq6N_vpm6Gq5qHE1sG0ITFKL43MxBznfv30Z0lfl_fdbr3Ut_k8boXOswN-kGoGcvUgkJSlxpAZdLcDsUTd61wgpGvkqp2FrkgXDJI8Frnkld81JwaM_kh1yM7kYKmSRLMjKa-Oo3_z6AIBHpsagoRMJ8YQ0RIau8WCuDCyk0bF2SXD87WgYNSxpLpVI7PlBl_QnKRb2QL53O0UNpJSQR1fvo9eRWgKO0cTmpWLb4R0ymwhhuzD_Co2uoeXREXJWmYNohQgKIuahWyAIT3_QSG9PlcR7AGJIGV5uQa5f715yOWXf6KvT6Yfvgfaly9u0DuQug==&c=o_RaStXWoDkWgAN2OvXNMNpv7yRG3JjaOVWYOIVU1pHoQoOVlrPdsA==&ch=-tx7u_fsMQ2mTneWrXqFQdc4U-NgqcgAr1z2oxopUDuMsAGglCR0gA==)
---
**FIRST:** We defied the odds, unseated Pelosi's candidate, and flipped this seat from BLUE to RED.

**THEN:** The Democrats made one thing very clear -- this seat remains a top-target! They spent $500,000.00 on ads attacking me and other conservatives, already campaigning to unseat us.

**NEXT:** Our opponent raised $200,000.00 in 24 hours to spend against us.

Now, Friend, we desperately need your help to keep up with the Democrats' cash flood. **[Can I count on you to chip in $10 right now to defend CA-39 from the Far Left and win back the House for Republicans?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fcFCrzBcdclN41lMgvJfnwNI5VYt0pxJLu_N6JJszgHKtnQ1hrrzOg_urjJ71EhRbAnM-4sGaYA8FMd8EQFI1cwSCkG937pntwUq8u__5D92nsnVVFLb0fEebvbfZtTwB20uUm7ot8pVjHTuawNitxWqdNUB5FQo0v97HrIiUlGeq9psdirj_tDbooDp6N5UtWxsSVUY3tMgk87EKGgzAEUQRjpYd75VrZQ8bIyzvBGfSQkHLPZTBWfTEo8aU9wgUfgE9beYrf_saOqUUuL2S2XpK09SFrVciwkkm2ruVK9o-geK2uaIb0k2cE4_VZjo94321rx4Ghx9i5034wW8ZKOHZWbmgAOTYcCYaYmjvXkfvVYifAYkdTnqgxJGQwUi57eRHqRvLVVLusw8sTNiwdw-0RzHnnRdRd11tTEoUpw=&c=o_RaStXWoDkWgAN2OvXNMNpv7yRG3JjaOVWYOIVU1pHoQoOVlrPdsA==&ch=-tx7u_fsMQ2mTneWrXqFQdc4U-NgqcgAr1z2oxopUDuMsAGglCR0gA==) The Democrats have proved they will spend tens of millions of dollars to win toss-up seats like ours.**

Young is an immigrant and proud conservative woman. She came to this country, put herself through college, started a business, raised a family, and is now one of the first Korean American women in Congress. She has always put hardworking Americans first and will continue to do so in Washington. But she can't fight for lower taxes, more jobs, and common-sense reforms without your help.

name: RoKhanna.com
subject: We really need your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Hedge funds and stock market insiders used their power to control the market and keep Main Street out of Wall Street.
#
We wanted to make sure you saw this email from Ro.
We created a petition to investigate Robinhood, regulate for short selling, and create rules against hedge funds using their power to create a rigged game. _And unfortunately, this is an issue that can quickly get sweeped under the rug if we don’t act soon._
We deserve a stock market that works for all, not just the hedge funds. **[Check out Ro’s message below and sign on to our petition right now.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6016?t=1&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)**
**[Sign your name >>](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6016?t=2&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)**
Together,
Team Ro
_
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
_ _From: Ro Khanna
_ _Date: Mon, FEB 2, 2021 at 11:40 AM
_ _Subject: Hedge funds must play by the same rules

_
There is fundamental inequality present in our stock market.
Just last week, when Americans tried to invest in the stock market, Wall Street hedge funds and trading platforms such as Robinhood prevented buyers from purchasing shares of Gamestop, AMC, and 11 other companies.
**Hedge funds and stock market insiders used their power to control the market and keep Main Street out of Wall Street.** They used these self-imposed restrictions to create a stock market that works for themselves, not the people.
But together, we can demand market equality. **[Will you join me in calling for an investigation into Robinhood, regulations for short selling, and rules against hedge funds using their power to create a rigged game? Sign our petition today >>](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6016?t=3&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)**
**[Sign your name >>](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6016?t=4&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)**
Hedge funds must play by the same rules that everyone else follows — but to do that we need to reform Wall Street and hold them accountable for this market manipulation.
The CEO of Robinhood is expected to testify before the U.S. House Financial Services Committee in two weeks, but market inequity goes beyond this one instance. We need more hearings that focus on hedge funds and clearing houses’ ability to control the stock market and make billions of dollars doing so, _all while over 50% of Americans are not involved in the stock market._
It’s time to fight for a stock market that works for all. **[Sign onto our petition demanding market equality through real reform and regulations.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6016?t=5&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)**
Let's do this,
Ro Khanna

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-emails?refcode=em20210213-1637-footer&t=6&refcode2=1637_946728_sVfWvM&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1637%2E946728%2EsVfWvM).
